title: iw merge-queue retry-merge rejects items in merge_failed status

steps.description: Extract OPERATOR_RECOVERABLE_MERGE_STATUSES shared constant in orch/daemon/merge_queue.py; align CLI retry filter with dashboard via that constant; add legacy failed-with-merge-notes back-compat path to the CLI; rewire dashboard to import the shared constant.
Review S01: CLI/dashboard parity, no orphan local copies of the status set, legacy back-compat path correct (only failed rows whose notes start with 'Merge failed' are accepted).

Reproduction test for merge_failed retry + regression tests for migration_invalid, migration_rebase_failed, migration_rolled_back, legacy failed-with-notes path, plain-failed rejection, and CLI/dashboard parity over the shared constant.
Review S03: tests verify semantic outcomes (statuses flipped to completed, merge_retry_requested DaemonEvent written, CLI exit code) — not just shape; parity test compares concrete enum members.

Final cross-step review: shared constant in place, CLI/dashboard parity via import (no second copy), all four recoverable statuses + legacy notes path covered by tests, regression tests would have failed against pre-fix code.
Self-assessment of the just-completed item via the iw-item-analyze skill.
